title: helichrysum retortoides
intro: Helichrysum retortoides, also known as Everlast Plant or African Helichrysum, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, native to South Africa and Mozambique. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Helichrysum retortoides include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health, among others. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be administered topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
